Rainy Jiangnan old street / 雨后江南老街, a young bookstore owner character in a deep navy linen changshan holding an old book, wet stone texture, wooden doorway, soft overcast light, 50mm documentary cinematic portrait style, restrained literary mood, muted teal-gray palette, shallow depth of field, avoid influencer posing by showing a quiet candid stance and unretouched skin texture.
